title: geranium petroselinum
intro: Geranium petroselinum, also known as geranium or storksbill, is a type of flowering plant native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Geranium petroselinum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate menstrual cramps, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Geranium petroselinum can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
